metadata.title: Nobody Knows the Trouble I've Seen
metadata.subtitle: African American spiritual, publ. 1867
metadata.lyricist: Traditional African American spiritual, first published in *Slave Songs of the United States* (1867)
metadata.x_pd_basis: Anonymous traditional spiritual; one of the earliest published African American spirituals (1867 in *Slave Songs of the United States*). PD by > 150 years
